steps.title: Read the graph range
steps.content: The assertion is about mean forest patch sizes in 1986 after a considerable drop. The graph's 1986 values fall within the smallest range offered, from 0 up to about 50 hectares.

steps.title: Reject oversized ranges
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice C use upper bounds that are much higher than the 1986 values shown. Those ranges would exaggerate the mean patch sizes for that year. The answer is D.
